description_long: This playground object is a swing set featuring a sturdy red metal frame with two arched side supports and a horizontal top bar. Suspended from the top bar are four swings: two with yellow seats and two with blue seats, each attached by metal chains. The swings are positioned over a circular patch of green grass, which serves as the play area base. The frame is robust and designed to withstand outdoor conditions, with the swings spaced evenly for safe use. The overall design is simple yet functional, prioritizing durability and safety for children. The bright colors and open structure make it visually appealing and inviting for play.
description: A red metal swing set with four swings—two yellow and two blue—suspended over a circular grassy area, designed for outdoor playground use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four swings (two yellow, two blue) hanging from the red frame over the grassy base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched red frame and the alignment of the swings, with only the nearest swing fully visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying all four swings and the full width of the swing set.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arched frame and the swings in profile, with the nearest swing most prominent.
